name: AutoDeafen+
description: Autodeafen for both Linux and Windows

enable.name: Enable AutoDeafen+
enable.description: Controls whether AutoDeafen+ should enable itself

undeafen.name: Enable Undeafening
undeafen.description: Controls if AutoDeafen+ will undeafen you at a certain percentage

discord_keybind.name: Discord Deafen Keybind
discord_keybind.description: Used to set what keybind Discord uses to trigger a deafen

pause_toggle.name: Undeafen on Pause
pause_toggle.description: Controls if AutoDeafen+ should undeafen you when the game is paused

startpos.name: Enable from StartPos
startpos.description: Controls if AutoDeafen+ should enable if you are playing from a StartPos

practise.name: Enable in Practise Mode
practise.description: Controls if AutoDeafen+ should enable if you are playing in Practise Mode

deafen_percentage.name: Default Deafen Percentage
deafen_percentage.description: Default percentage for a level to deafen you in Discord at (if enabled)

undeafen_percentage.name: Default Undeafen Percentage
undeafen_percentage.description: Default percentage for a level to undeafen you in Discord at (if enabled)
